## Acceptance Criteria

No blocking findings.

- REQ-01: `.jit/invariants.toml` entries with `statement`, `kind`, and optional `enforced-by` are loaded into `JitConfig::invariants`: [config.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/config.rs:51), [invariants.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/validation/invariants.rs:102).
- REQ-02: both `JitConfig::load` return paths load invariants: config-absent path at [config.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/config.rs:751), config-present path at [config.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/config.rs:811).
- REQ-03: `jit item list --kind invariant --json` is wired through the generic item command and projects entries as `@/<self-id>`: [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:84), [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:396), covered by [invariant_registry_story_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/invariant_registry_story_tests.rs:226).
- REQ-04: invalid entries fail with `InvariantConfigError` and descriptive context: [invariants.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/validation/invariants.rs:22), [invariants.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/validation/invariants.rs:232), covered by [invariant_registry_story_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/invariant_registry_story_tests.rs:312).
- REQ-05: invariant is reserved as project-scoped registry-first, preventing markdown indexing: [domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:484), [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:170), covered by [invariant_registry_story_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/invariant_registry_story_tests.rs:424).

## Architecture And Separation Of Concerns

Pass. Domain projection remains pure in `domain/item.rs`; command code orchestrates config, storage, and projection in [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:1). Config-time file loading is confined to the config/validation loader path requested by the issue, mirroring the existing rule loader pattern.

## Functional Paradigm

Pass. The new projection paths use iterator-based transformations for registry projection and indexing: [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:396), [domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:1155). No avoidable imperative state machine was introduced.

## Correctness And Invariants

Pass. The change is read/query focused and does not introduce state mutation, file writes, event logging changes, gate transitions, PID handling, assignee parsing, or label parsing. The invariant kind cannot be configured into a markdown-first or issue-scoped path: [domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:491).

## Safety

Pass. Workspace unsafe denial is present in [lib.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/lib.rs:6) and [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:14); I found no unsafe code in the reviewed paths.

## Testing

Pass. The issue has a succeeded `cargo-ci` gate in [.jit/issues/69bd8cd5-2646-457a-a413-ced3b1873dd9.json](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.jit/issues/69bd8cd5-2646-457a-a413-ced3b1873dd9.json:15), so I did not rerun cargo tests. Story-level integration coverage exists in [invariant_registry_story_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/invariant_registry_story_tests.rs:1). I ran `./scripts/jit-validate.sh`; it passed.

## Error Handling

Pass. Loader errors use `thiserror` with contextual variants, including I/O path, TOML parse details, and duplicate ids: [invariants.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/validation/invariants.rs:43). `JitConfig::load` adds file-level context without losing the underlying typed error: [config.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/config.rs:775).

## CLI Contract

Pass. `jit item list`, `show`, `resolve`, and `search` all expose `--json`: [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:320). JSON errors are handled for item commands in [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:432).

## Documentation

Pass. New public invariant APIs have doc comments with examples: `InvariantConfigError`, `InvariantKind`, `Invariant`, `InvariantRegistry`, `load`, and `from_toml_str` in [invariants.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/validation/invariants.rs:22).

## Prior Review Feedback

Not applicable. `run_history` is empty for this issue.

## Jit Issue Management

Pass. `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed. The listed dependency `93480b00` is complete with both required gates passed: [.jit/issues/93480b00-6322-48ac-8d66-36ab6c6dc8be.json](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.jit/issues/93480b00-6322-48ac-8d66-36ab6c6dc8be.json:5).

VERDICT: PASS
